violations.text: Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (food storage) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (dough mixer, ice machine,vegetable chopper and pizza cutter) were observed with an accumulation of food and/or debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Ice machine taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

( Shredded pork, chicken, pasta, and alfredo sauce ) was observed held at (110-112) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated food to 165 and/or above. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

(Dairy products and juices ) was observed held at (50-56 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

(Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Working containers of (dry ingredients ) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

(Yogurts ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

(Grab n Go cooler ) located in the (retail ) area was not in good repair.Ambient temperatures observed at 55df.Establishment not allowed to store any TCS food in unit until repair and/or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025
Observed leakage at faucet on the prep sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (food storage) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
The (walls ) in the (retail near beverage cooler ) area is in poor repair. Observed a hole in wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The floors throughout kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
Food storage containers were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

(Various food product) was observed held at (120-121 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated food to 165 or above New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

The floors under 3 bay sink have an accumulation of soil, food residue, and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

Raw animal foods (whole shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (packages sauces/condiments) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution in the sanitizer buckets was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. PIC diluted solution during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Potatoes were observed cooling in walk-in cooler covered with plastic wrap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the reach-in refrigerators have an accumulation of dirt, food residue, and other debris on door handles and gaskets. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
Leaks were observed at the 3-bay sink and the prep sink. Air gap at prep sink was observed not properly aligned. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

The floors in the storage area has an accumulation of dust, soil residue and old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
